LanguageData.ProsthesesCore.SystemShutdown: The system is completely disabled from lack of power.
LanguageData.ProsthesesCore.SystemLosesEnergy: The system is losing energy. Disabling some functions or adding generators is required, otherwise the system will be completely shutdown.\n\nTo disable parts of the system, install the CPU and open the system options menu.
LanguageData.ProsthesesCore.SystemEMPStunned: The system in EMP field. Work is not possible.
LanguageData.ProsthesesCore.CPUDesc: Setting up, disabling and modeling the prosthesis system.
LanguageData.ProsthesesCore.NoProstheses: There are no prostheses to customize
LanguageData.ProsthesesCore.ProsthesisDisabled: The prosthesis is disabled, first turn it on.
LanguageData.ProsthesesCore.NotEnoughEnergy: There is not enough energy in the system to use the ability.
LanguageData.ProsthesesCore.EnergyAlert: Are you sure you want to install {0}?\n\nThe power gain will be negative ({1}), which may result in a complete shutdown of the system. This can cause death in the presence of vital prostheses of the internal organs.
